---
title: "double_ml_extended"
author: "Alexander Unger"
date: "2026-05-21"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# CARD (1995) — DoubleML EXTENDED
# ==============================================================================


# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK A — SETUP
# ==============================================================================
source("/Users/alexung/Desktop/master_thesis/showing/reque_for_extended.R")
library(DoubleML)
library(mlr3verse)
library(OutcomeWeights)   # MUST be dev version from GitHub
library(cobalt)
library(viridis)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggplot2)

# Guard: verify card_1995_replication.R objects are in memory
stopifnot(
  exists("card_clean"), exists("D1"), exists("D2"), exists("Z"),
  exists("Y_dol"), exists("Y_cnt"),
  exists("X_card_kappa"), exists("X_kit_kappa"),
  exists("kappa_weights"), exists("tau_u"), exists("tau_a10"),
  exists("tau_unnorm"), exists("logit_mle"),
  exists("kappa_outcome_weights"), exists("weight_diag"),
  exists("check_weight_identity"), exists("get_cbps_p"),
  exists("kappa_analytic_se_all")
)

# Verify dev version of OutcomeWeights supports DoubleML objects
cat("OutcomeWeights version:", as.character(packageVersion("OutcomeWeights")), "\n")
cat("get_outcome_weights methods:\n")
print(methods("get_outcome_weights"))
cat("\n")

k_shift <- log(100)   # Y_cnt = Y_dol + k_shift


kappa_weights_bundle <- function(Z, D, X_kappa) {
  p_ml  <- logit_mle(Z, X_kappa)
  p_cb  <- get_cbps_p(Z, X_kappa)
  kw_ml <- kappa_outcome_weights(Z, D, p_ml)
  kw_cb <- kappa_outcome_weights(Z, D, p_cb)
  list(
    tau_cb_u   = kw_cb$w_u,
    tau_ml_u   = kw_ml$w_u,
    tau_ml_a10 = kw_ml$w_a10,
    tau_ml_a   = kw_ml$w_a,
    tau_ml_a1  = kw_ml$w_a1,
    tau_ml_a0  = kw_ml$w_a0
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper functions 
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Extract scalar coefficient from a DoubleMLIIVM object
get_dml_coef <- function(obj) as.numeric(obj$coef)

# Algebraic identity check for DoubleML: omega'Y == tau_hat
# omega_obj$omega is a (1 x N) matrix for DoubleMLIIVM
check_doubleml_identity <- function(omega_obj, Y, coef, tol = 1e-8) {
  isTRUE(all.equal(
    as.numeric(omega_obj$omega %*% Y),
    as.numeric(coef),
    tolerance = tol
  ))
}


doubleml_translation_row <- function(name, w, Y_dol, Y_cnt, k_shift) {
  ed <- sum(w * Y_dol)
  ec <- sum(w * Y_cnt)
  data.frame(
    Estimator   = name,
    Dollars     = round(ed, 4),
    Cents       = round(ec, 4),
    Diff_actual = round(ec - ed, 6),
    Diff_pred   = round(sum(w) * k_shift, 6),
    Match       = isTRUE(all.equal(ec - ed, sum(w) * k_shift, tolerance = 1e-8)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# Extract SE from DoubleMLIIVM summary
get_dml_se <- function(obj) {
  s <- obj$summary()
  if ("std err" %in% colnames(s)) return(as.numeric(s[1, "std err"]))
  if ("Std. Error" %in% colnames(s)) return(as.numeric(s[1, "Std. Error"]))
  NA_real_
}

make_X <- function(formula, data) {
  mm <- model.matrix(formula, data = data)
  m  <- matrix(as.numeric(mm), nrow = nrow(mm), ncol = ncol(mm))
  colnames(m) <- colnames(mm)
  m
}

# DML X matrices (no intercept; DoubleML adds its own)
X_dml_card <- make_X(
  ~ 0 + exper + expersq + black + south + smsa + smsa66 +
    reg661 + reg662 + reg663 + reg664 + reg665 + reg666 + reg667 + reg668,
  data = card_clean
)
X_dml_kit <- make_X(
  ~ 0 + black + south + smsa + smsa66 + south66,
  data = card_clean
)



# Helper: build DoubleMLData for one (treatment, spec) cell
make_dml_data <- function(D, X_dml, spec_label) {
  df <- as.data.frame(X_dml)
  df$y <- as.numeric(Y_dol)
  df$d <- as.numeric(D)
  df$z <- as.numeric(Z)
  x_cols <- colnames(X_dml)
  cat(sprintf("  DoubleMLData: %s | N=%d | k=%d | mean(D)=%.3f | mean(Z)=%.3f\n",
              spec_label, nrow(df), length(x_cols), mean(df$d), mean(df$z)))
  DoubleMLData$new(
    data   = df,
    y_col  = "y",
    d_cols = "d",
    z_cols = "z",
    x_cols = x_cols
  )
}

cat("Building DoubleML data objects...\n")
dml_data_card_d1 <- make_dml_data(D1, X_dml_card, "Card/somecol")
dml_data_card_d2 <- make_dml_data(D2, X_dml_card, "Card/educ16")
dml_data_kit_d1  <- make_dml_data(D1, X_dml_kit,  "Kitagawa/somecol")
dml_data_kit_d2  <- make_dml_data(D2, X_dml_kit,  "Kitagawa/educ16")
cat("Done.\n\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Pre-compute kappa reference weights (used in Block E comparison table)
# These are the MLE-based weight bundles from the kappa replication.
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
cat("Pre-computing kappa reference weights...\n")
kw_ref_card_d1 <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z, D1, X_card_kappa)
kw_ref_card_d2 <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z, D2, X_card_kappa)
kw_ref_kit_d1  <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z, D1, X_kit_kappa)
kw_ref_kit_d2  <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z, D2, X_kit_kappa)

# Pre-compute kappa point estimates for comparison table (dollars)
cat("Pre-computing kappa point estimates (dollars)...\n")
kappa_card_d1 <- kappa_analytic_se_all(Y_dol, Z, D1, X_card_kappa)
kappa_card_d2 <- kappa_analytic_se_all(Y_dol, Z, D2, X_card_kappa)
kappa_kit_d1  <- kappa_analytic_se_all(Y_dol, Z, D1, X_kit_kappa)
kappa_kit_d2  <- kappa_analytic_se_all(Y_dol, Z, D2, X_kit_kappa)
cat("Done.\n\n")

cat(sprintf(
  "BLOCK A ready. N=%d | somecol: %.1f%% | educ16: %.1f%% | nearc4: %.1f%%\n\n",
  nrow(card_clean), mean(D1)*100, mean(D2)*100, mean(Z)*100
))

```



```{r}

# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK B — DoubleMLIIVM: LINEAR + LOGISTIC  (parametric baseline)
# ==============================================================================
#
# Nuisance learners:
#   ml_g (E[Y|X,D,Z]):   regr.lm         — OLS regression
#   ml_m (P(Z=1|X)):     classif.log_reg  — logistic regression
#   ml_r (P(D=1|X,Z)):   classif.log_reg  — logistic regression
#

cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK B — DoubleMLIIVM: linear + logistic (parametric baseline)\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

# --- B1: somecol, Card specification ---
# 3 specifications, one for the outcome, one for the treatment and one for the instrument
set.seed(42)
cat("B1: somecol, Card specification\n")
iivm_lm_card_d1 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_card_d1,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.lm"),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.log_reg"),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.log_reg"),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_lm_card_d1$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_lm_card_d1$summary())

omega_lm_card_d1  <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_lm_card_d1,
                                          dml_data = dml_data_card_d1)
w_lm_card_d1      <- as.vector(omega_lm_card_d1$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_lm_card_d1, Y_dol, iivm_lm_card_d1$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_lm_card_d1, "Wald-AIPW (linear+logit, Card, somecol)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# --- B2: educ16, Card specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("B2: educ16, Card specification\n")
iivm_lm_card_d2 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_card_d2,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.lm"),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.log_reg"),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.log_reg"),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_lm_card_d2$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_lm_card_d2$summary())

omega_lm_card_d2  <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_lm_card_d2,
                                          dml_data = dml_data_card_d2)
w_lm_card_d2      <- as.vector(omega_lm_card_d2$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_lm_card_d2, Y_dol, iivm_lm_card_d2$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_lm_card_d2, "Wald-AIPW (linear+logit, Card, educ16)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# --- B3: somecol, Kitagawa specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("B3: somecol, Kitagawa specification\n")
iivm_lm_kit_d1 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_kit_d1,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.lm"),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.log_reg"),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.log_reg"),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_lm_kit_d1$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_lm_kit_d1$summary())

omega_lm_kit_d1  <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_lm_kit_d1,
                                         dml_data = dml_data_kit_d1)
w_lm_kit_d1      <- as.vector(omega_lm_kit_d1$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_lm_kit_d1, Y_dol, iivm_lm_kit_d1$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_lm_kit_d1, "Wald-AIPW (linear+logit, Kitagawa, somecol)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# --- B4: educ16, Kitagawa specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("B4: educ16, Kitagawa specification\n")
iivm_lm_kit_d2 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_kit_d2,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.lm"),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.log_reg"),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.log_reg"),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_lm_kit_d2$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_lm_kit_d2$summary())

omega_lm_kit_d2  <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_lm_kit_d2,
                                         dml_data = dml_data_kit_d2)
w_lm_kit_d2      <- as.vector(omega_lm_kit_d2$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_lm_kit_d2, Y_dol, iivm_lm_kit_d2$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_lm_kit_d2, "Wald-AIPW (linear+logit, Kitagawa, educ16)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\nBLOCK B done.\n\n")


```




```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK C — DoubleMLIIVM: RANGER RANDOM FOREST
# ==============================================================================
#
# Nuisance learners:
#   ml_g: regr.ranger    (keep.inbag = TRUE — REQUIRED for omega'Y = tau_hat)
#   ml_m: classif.ranger (keep.inbag = TRUE)
#   ml_r: classif.ranger (keep.inbag = TRUE)


cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK C — DoubleMLIIVM: ranger random forest\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

# --- C1: somecol, Card specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("C1: somecol, Card specification\n")
iivm_rf_card_d1 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_card_d1,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.ranger",    keep.inbag = TRUE),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.ranger", keep.inbag = TRUE),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.ranger", keep.inbag = TRUE),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_rf_card_d1$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_rf_card_d1$summary())

omega_rf_card_d1  <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_rf_card_d1,
                                          dml_data = dml_data_card_d1)
w_rf_card_d1      <- as.vector(omega_rf_card_d1$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_rf_card_d1, Y_dol, iivm_rf_card_d1$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_rf_card_d1, "Wald-AIPW (ranger, Card, somecol)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# --- C2: educ16, Card specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("C2: educ16, Card specification\n")
iivm_rf_card_d2 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_card_d2,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.ranger",    keep.inbag = TRUE),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.ranger", keep.inbag = TRUE),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.ranger", keep.inbag = TRUE),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_rf_card_d2$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_rf_card_d2$summary())

omega_rf_card_d2  <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_rf_card_d2,
                                          dml_data = dml_data_card_d2)
w_rf_card_d2      <- as.vector(omega_rf_card_d2$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_rf_card_d2, Y_dol, iivm_rf_card_d2$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_rf_card_d2, "Wald-AIPW (ranger, Card, educ16)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# --- C3: somecol, Kitagawa specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("C3: somecol, Kitagawa specification\n")
iivm_rf_kit_d1 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_kit_d1,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.ranger",    keep.inbag = TRUE),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.ranger", keep.inbag = TRUE),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.ranger", keep.inbag = TRUE),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_rf_kit_d1$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_rf_kit_d1$summary())

omega_rf_kit_d1  <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_rf_kit_d1,
                                         dml_data = dml_data_kit_d1)
w_rf_kit_d1      <- as.vector(omega_rf_kit_d1$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_rf_kit_d1, Y_dol, iivm_rf_kit_d1$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_rf_kit_d1, "Wald-AIPW (ranger, Kitagawa, somecol)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# --- C4: educ16, Kitagawa specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("C4: educ16, Kitagawa specification\n")
iivm_rf_kit_d2 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_kit_d2,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.ranger",    keep.inbag = TRUE),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.ranger", keep.inbag = TRUE),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.ranger", keep.inbag = TRUE),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_rf_kit_d2$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_rf_kit_d2$summary())

omega_rf_kit_d2  <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_rf_kit_d2,
                                         dml_data = dml_data_kit_d2)
w_rf_kit_d2      <- as.vector(omega_rf_kit_d2$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_rf_kit_d2, Y_dol, iivm_rf_kit_d2$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_rf_kit_d2, "Wald-AIPW (ranger, Kitagawa, educ16)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\nBLOCK C done.\n\n")
```




```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK D — DoubleMLIIVM: XGBOOST
# ==============================================================================
#
# Nuisance learners:
#   ml_g: regr.xgboost    (alpha=0, subsample=1, max_delta_step=0, base_score=0)
#   ml_m: classif.xgboost (alpha=0, subsample=1, max_delta_step=0)
#   ml_r: classif.xgboost (alpha=0, subsample=1, max_delta_step=0)


cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK D — DoubleMLIIVM: XGBoost\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

# --- D1: somecol, Card specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("D1: somecol, Card specification\n")
iivm_xgb_card_d1 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_card_d1,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0, base_score = 0),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_xgb_card_d1$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_xgb_card_d1$summary())

omega_xgb_card_d1 <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_xgb_card_d1,
                                          dml_data = dml_data_card_d1)
w_xgb_card_d1     <- as.vector(omega_xgb_card_d1$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_xgb_card_d1, Y_dol, iivm_xgb_card_d1$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_xgb_card_d1, "Wald-AIPW (XGBoost, Card, somecol)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# --- D2: educ16, Card specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("D2: educ16, Card specification\n")
iivm_xgb_card_d2 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_card_d2,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0, base_score = 0),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_xgb_card_d2$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_xgb_card_d2$summary())

omega_xgb_card_d2 <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_xgb_card_d2,
                                          dml_data = dml_data_card_d2)
w_xgb_card_d2     <- as.vector(omega_xgb_card_d2$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_xgb_card_d2, Y_dol, iivm_xgb_card_d2$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_xgb_card_d2, "Wald-AIPW (XGBoost, Card, educ16)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# --- D3: somecol, Kitagawa specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("D3: somecol, Kitagawa specification\n")
iivm_xgb_kit_d1 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_kit_d1,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0, base_score = 0),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_xgb_kit_d1$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_xgb_kit_d1$summary())

omega_xgb_kit_d1 <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_xgb_kit_d1,
                                         dml_data = dml_data_kit_d1)
w_xgb_kit_d1     <- as.vector(omega_xgb_kit_d1$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_xgb_kit_d1, Y_dol, iivm_xgb_kit_d1$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_xgb_kit_d1, "Wald-AIPW (XGBoost, Kitagawa, somecol)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

# --- D4: educ16, Kitagawa specification ---
set.seed(42)
cat("D4: educ16, Kitagawa specification\n")
iivm_xgb_kit_d2 <- DoubleMLIIVM$new(
  data    = dml_data_kit_d2,
  ml_g    = lrn("regr.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0, base_score = 0),
  ml_m    = lrn("classif.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0),
  ml_r    = lrn("classif.xgboost",
                alpha = 0, subsample = 1, max_delta_step = 0),
  n_folds = 5,
  score   = "LATE"
)
iivm_xgb_kit_d2$fit(store_models = TRUE, store_predictions = TRUE)
cat("  Point estimate:\n"); print(iivm_xgb_kit_d2$summary())

omega_xgb_kit_d2 <- get_outcome_weights(object = iivm_xgb_kit_d2,
                                         dml_data = dml_data_kit_d2)
w_xgb_kit_d2     <- as.vector(omega_xgb_kit_d2$omega)
cat(sprintf("  Algebraic check (omega'Y = tau_hat): %s\n",
            check_doubleml_identity(omega_xgb_kit_d2, Y_dol, iivm_xgb_kit_d2$coef)))
print(weight_diag(w_xgb_kit_d2, "Wald-AIPW (XGBoost, Kitagawa, educ16)"),
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\nBLOCK D done.\n\n")


```



```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK E — LEARNER COMPARISON TABLE: DoubleML vs grf vs Kappa
# ==============================================================================
#
# Presents all point estimates side-by-side for Y = log(wage/100) (dollars).
# Rows: DoubleML learners (B-D) + grf OutcomeWeights (from card_1995_double_ml.R,
#       if in memory) + kappa estimators (from card_1995_replication.R).
# Columns: 4 cells (treatment × spec).
#

cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK E — LEARNER COMPARISON TABLE: DoubleML vs grf vs kappa\n")
cat("(log wages in dollars)\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

# Helper: print one formatted cell (coef + stars + SE)
pc <- function(coef, se = NA) {
  if (is.na(coef) || !is.finite(coef)) return(sprintf("%17s", "NA"))
  if (is.na(se)   || !is.finite(se) || se <= 0)
    return(sprintf("%8.3f       ", coef))
  pval  <- 2 * pnorm(-abs(coef / se))
  stars <- ifelse(pval < 0.01, "***", ifelse(pval < 0.05, "**",
           ifelse(pval < 0.10, "*",   "   ")))
  sprintf("%8.3f%s(%5.3f)", coef, stars, se)
}

# Column headers: 4 cells
hdr <- sprintf("%-38s  %-17s  %-17s  %-17s  %-17s",
               "Estimator",
               "somecol|Card",
               "somecol|Kitagawa",
               "educ16|Card",
               "educ16|Kitagawa")
cat(hdr, "\n")
cat(strrep("-", nchar(hdr) + 5), "\n")

# ------ DoubleML rows ------
# Linear + logistic
cat(sprintf("%-38s  %s  %s  %s  %s\n",
    "Wald-AIPW (DoubleML, linear+logit)",
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_lm_card_d1), get_dml_se(iivm_lm_card_d1)),
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_lm_kit_d1),  get_dml_se(iivm_lm_kit_d1)),
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_lm_card_d2), get_dml_se(iivm_lm_card_d2)),
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_lm_kit_d2),  get_dml_se(iivm_lm_kit_d2))))

# Ranger
cat(sprintf("%-38s  %s  %s  %s  %s\n",
    "Wald-AIPW (DoubleML, ranger)",
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_rf_card_d1), get_dml_se(iivm_rf_card_d1)),
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_rf_kit_d1),  get_dml_se(iivm_rf_kit_d1)),
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_rf_card_d2), get_dml_se(iivm_rf_card_d2)),
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_rf_kit_d2),  get_dml_se(iivm_rf_kit_d2))))

# XGBoost
cat(sprintf("%-38s  %s  %s  %s  %s\n",
    "Wald-AIPW (DoubleML, XGBoost)",
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_xgb_card_d1), get_dml_se(iivm_xgb_card_d1)),
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_xgb_kit_d1),  get_dml_se(iivm_xgb_kit_d1)),
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_xgb_card_d2), get_dml_se(iivm_xgb_card_d2)),
    pc(get_dml_coef(iivm_xgb_kit_d2),  get_dml_se(iivm_xgb_kit_d2))))

cat(strrep("-", nchar(hdr) + 5), "\n")

# ------ grf OutcomeWeights rows (from card_1995_double_ml.R — optional) ------
if (exists("w_plriv_card_d1") && exists("res_card_d1")) {
  # PLR-IV (grf)
  e_plriv <- list(
    card_d1 = get_estimate(res_card_d1, "PLR-IV"),
    kit_d1  = get_estimate(res_kit_d1,  "PLR-IV"),
    card_d2 = get_estimate(res_card_d2, "PLR-IV"),
    kit_d2  = get_estimate(res_kit_d2,  "PLR-IV")
  )
  # SE from summary matrices (column 2 = SE)
  se_from_res <- function(res, row) {
    tryCatch(as.numeric(res[row, "SE"]), error = function(e) NA_real_)
  }
  cat(sprintf("%-38s  %s  %s  %s  %s\n",
      "PLR-IV (grf OutcomeWeights)",
      pc(e_plriv$card_d1, se_from_res(res_card_d1, "PLR-IV")),
      pc(e_plriv$kit_d1,  se_from_res(res_kit_d1,  "PLR-IV")),
      pc(e_plriv$card_d2, se_from_res(res_card_d2, "PLR-IV")),
      pc(e_plriv$kit_d2,  se_from_res(res_kit_d2,  "PLR-IV"))))

  e_waipw <- list(
    card_d1 = get_estimate(res_card_d1, "Wald-AIPW"),
    kit_d1  = get_estimate(res_kit_d1,  "Wald-AIPW"),
    card_d2 = get_estimate(res_card_d2, "Wald-AIPW"),
    kit_d2  = get_estimate(res_kit_d2,  "Wald-AIPW")
  )
  cat(sprintf("%-38s  %s  %s  %s  %s\n",
      "Wald-AIPW (grf OutcomeWeights)",
      pc(e_waipw$card_d1, se_from_res(res_card_d1, "Wald-AIPW")),
      pc(e_waipw$kit_d1,  se_from_res(res_kit_d1,  "Wald-AIPW")),
      pc(e_waipw$card_d2, se_from_res(res_card_d2, "Wald-AIPW")),
      pc(e_waipw$kit_d2,  se_from_res(res_kit_d2,  "Wald-AIPW"))))
  cat(strrep("-", nchar(hdr) + 5), "\n")
} else {
  cat("[grf rows skipped — run card_1995_double_ml.R first for these]\n")
  cat(strrep("-", nchar(hdr) + 5), "\n")
}

# ------ Kappa rows ------
kappa_est_list <- list(
  card_d1 = kappa_card_d1, kit_d1 = kappa_kit_d1,
  card_d2 = kappa_card_d2, kit_d2 = kappa_kit_d2
)
kappa_row_defs <- list(
  list(key = "tau_cb_u",   label = "tau_cb_u   (kappa, CBPS, normalised)"),
  list(key = "tau_ml_u",   label = "tau_ml_u   (kappa, MLE,  normalised)"),
  list(key = "tau_ml_a10", label = "tau_ml_a10 (kappa, MLE,  normalised)"),
  list(key = "tau_ml_a",   label = "tau_ml_a   (kappa, MLE,  unnorm.)"),
  list(key = "tau_ml_t",   label = "tau_ml_t   (kappa, MLE,  unnorm.)"),
  list(key = "tau_ml_a0",  label = "tau_ml_a0  (kappa, MLE,  unnorm.)")
)
for (r in kappa_row_defs) {
  k <- r$key
  cat(sprintf("%-38s  %s  %s  %s  %s\n", r$label,
      pc(kappa_card_d1$estimates[k], kappa_card_d1$se[k]),
      pc(kappa_kit_d1$estimates[k],  kappa_kit_d1$se[k]),
      pc(kappa_card_d2$estimates[k], kappa_card_d2$se[k]),
      pc(kappa_kit_d2$estimates[k],  kappa_kit_d2$se[k])))
}

cat(strrep("=", nchar(hdr) + 5), "\n")
```



```{r}
# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK F — TRANSLATION INVARIANCE: DoubleML LEARNERS VS KAPPA
# ==============================================================================


cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK F — TRANSLATION INVARIANCE: DoubleML LEARNERS VS KAPPA\n")
cat(sprintf("k = log(100) = %.6f\n", k_shift))
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

# Helper: print one translation-invariance block for one (treatment, spec) cell
print_ti_block <- function(cell_label, D, X_kappa,
                            w_lm, w_rf, w_xgb) {
  cat(sprintf("--- %s ---\n", cell_label))
  cat(sprintf("  %-38s  %8s  %8s  %10s  %10s  %7s\n",
              "Estimator", "Dollars", "Cents", "Diff(act)", "Diff(pred)", "Match?"))
  cat(strrep("-", 88), "\n")

  p_ml  <- logit_mle(Z, X_kappa)
  p_cb  <- get_cbps_p(Z, X_kappa)
  kw_ml <- kappa_outcome_weights(Z, D, p_ml)
  kw_cb <- kappa_outcome_weights(Z, D, p_cb)

  pr <- function(name, w) {
    ed   <- sum(w * Y_dol)
    ec   <- sum(w * Y_cnt)
    act  <- ec - ed
    pred <- sum(w) * k_shift
    ok   <- isTRUE(all.equal(act, pred, tolerance = 1e-6))
    cat(sprintf("  %-38s  %8.4f  %8.4f  %10.4f  %10.4f  %7s\n",
                name, ed, ec, act, pred, if (ok) "TRUE" else "FALSE"))
  }

  pr("Wald-AIPW (DoubleML, linear+logit)", w_lm)
  pr("Wald-AIPW (DoubleML, ranger)",       w_rf)
  pr("Wald-AIPW (DoubleML, XGBoost)",      w_xgb)
  cat("\n")
}

print_ti_block("Card spec — somecol (D1)",
               D1, X_card_kappa,
               w_lm_card_d1, w_rf_card_d1, w_xgb_card_d1)

print_ti_block("Card spec — educ16 (D2)",
               D2, X_card_kappa,
               w_lm_card_d2, w_rf_card_d2, w_xgb_card_d2)

print_ti_block("Kitagawa spec — somecol (D1)",
               D1, X_kit_kappa,
               w_lm_kit_d1, w_rf_kit_d1, w_xgb_kit_d1)

print_ti_block("Kitagawa spec — educ16 (D2)",
               D2, X_kit_kappa,
               w_lm_kit_d2, w_rf_kit_d2, w_xgb_kit_d2)

cat("Interpretation:\n")
cat("  Sum_w ~= 0  => translation invariant (all DoubleML + normalised kappa).\n")
cat("  Sum_w != 0  => estimate changes with outcome unit (unnorm. kappa only).\n\n")


# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK G — WEIGHT DIAGNOSTICS: ALL LEARNERS × 4 CELLS
# ==============================================================================

cat("BLOCK G — WEIGHT DIAGNOSTICS: ALL LEARNERS × 4 CELLS\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")
cat("Sum_w = 0 => translation invariant | ESS = 1/sum(w_i^2)\n\n")

print_diag_block <- function(cell_label, D, X_kappa,
                              w_lm, w_rf, w_xgb,
                              kw_ref) {
  cat(sprintf("--- %s ---\n", cell_label))
  tab <- rbind(
    weight_diag(w_lm,           "Wald-AIPW (DoubleML, linear+logit)"),
    weight_diag(w_rf,           "Wald-AIPW (DoubleML, ranger)"),
    weight_diag(w_xgb,          "Wald-AIPW (DoubleML, XGBoost)")
  )
  print(tab, row.names = FALSE)
  cat("\n")
}

print_diag_block("Card spec — somecol (D1)",
                  D1, X_card_kappa,
                  w_lm_card_d1, w_rf_card_d1, w_xgb_card_d1,
                  kw_ref_card_d1)

print_diag_block("Card spec — educ16 (D2)",
                  D2, X_card_kappa,
                  w_lm_card_d2, w_rf_card_d2, w_xgb_card_d2,
                  kw_ref_card_d2)

print_diag_block("Kitagawa spec — somecol (D1)",
                  D1, X_kit_kappa,
                  w_lm_kit_d1, w_rf_kit_d1, w_xgb_kit_d1,
                  kw_ref_kit_d1)

print_diag_block("Kitagawa spec — educ16 (D2)",
                  D2, X_kit_kappa,
                  w_lm_kit_d2, w_rf_kit_d2, w_xgb_kit_d2,
                  kw_ref_kit_d2)

```





```{r}

# ==============================================================================
# BLOCK H — LOVE PLOTS: LEARNER COMPARISON
# ==============================================================================

cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("BLOCK H — LOVE PLOTS: LEARNER COMPARISON\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n\n")

# --- H1: Card spec, somecol — 3 DoubleML + 2 kappa ---
cat("H1: Love plots — Card specification, somecol (D1)\n\n")

make_love_h1 <- function(title_str, w_vec) {
  # For cobalt: multiply by (2*D1 - 1) so positive = treated, negative = control
  cobalt::love.plot(
    D1 ~ X_dml_card,
    weights    = w_vec * (2 * D1 - 1),
    position   = "bottom",
    title      = title_str,
    thresholds = c(m = 0.1),
    var.order  = "unadjusted",
    binary     = "std",
    abs        = TRUE,
    line       = TRUE,
    colors     = viridis::viridis(2),
    shapes     = c("circle", "triangle")
  )
}

# Refresh kappa bundles (self-contained, independent of Block G)
kw_ref_card_d1 <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z, D1, X_card_kappa)

lp_h1_1 <- make_love_h1("Wald-AIPW linear+logit",
                          w_lm_card_d1)
lp_h1_2 <- make_love_h1("Wald-AIPW ranger",
                          w_rf_card_d1)
lp_h1_3 <- make_love_h1("Wald-AIPW XGBoost",
                          w_xgb_card_d1)
lp_h1_4 <- make_love_h1("tau_cb_u",
                          kw_ref_card_d1$tau_cb_u)
lp_h1_5 <- make_love_h1("tau_ml_u",
                          kw_ref_card_d1$tau_ml_u)

grid.arrange(lp_h1_1, lp_h1_2, lp_h1_3, lp_h1_4, lp_h1_5,
             nrow = 1,
             top = "Love plots: DoubleML learners vs kappa | Card spec | somecol")


# --- H2: Card spec, educ16 — 3 DoubleML + 2 kappa ---
cat("\nH2: Love plots — Card specification, educ16 (D2)\n\n")

make_love_h2 <- function(title_str, w_vec) {
  cobalt::love.plot(
    D2 ~ X_dml_card,
    weights    = w_vec * (2 * D2 - 1),
    position   = "bottom",
    title      = title_str,
    thresholds = c(m = 0.1),
    var.order  = "unadjusted",
    binary     = "std",
    abs        = TRUE,
    line       = TRUE,
    colors     = viridis::viridis(2),
    shapes     = c("circle", "triangle")
  )
}

kw_ref_card_d2 <- kappa_weights_bundle(Z, D2, X_card_kappa)

lp_h2_1 <- make_love_h2("Wald-AIPW linear+logit",
                          w_lm_card_d2)
lp_h2_2 <- make_love_h2("Wald-AIPW  ranger",
                          w_rf_card_d2)
lp_h2_3 <- make_love_h2("Wald-AIPW XGBoost",
                          w_xgb_card_d2)
lp_h2_4 <- make_love_h2("tau_cb_u",
                          kw_ref_card_d2$tau_cb_u)
lp_h2_5 <- make_love_h2("tau_ml_u",
                          kw_ref_card_d2$tau_ml_u)

grid.arrange(lp_h2_1, lp_h2_2, lp_h2_3, lp_h2_4, lp_h2_5,
             nrow = 1,
             top = "Love plots: DoubleML learners vs kappa | Card spec | educ16")




# --- H3: Spec comparison — ranger, somecol: Card vs Kitagawa ---
# This isolates the spec effect: same learner (ranger), same treatment (somecol),
# different covariate space. Differences in SMDs show whether the richer Card
# spec leads to better or worse complier balance.

cat("\nH3: Love plots — ranger learner, Card vs Kitagawa, somecol (D1)\n\n")

make_love_card_d1 <- function(title_str, w_vec) {
  cobalt::love.plot(
    D1 ~ X_dml_card,
    weights    = w_vec * (2 * D1 - 1),
    position   = "bottom",
    title      = title_str,
    thresholds = c(m = 0.1),
    var.order  = "unadjusted",
    binary     = "std",
    abs        = TRUE,
    line       = TRUE,
    colors     = viridis::viridis(2),
    shapes     = c("circle", "triangle")
  )
}

make_love_kit_d1 <- function(title_str, w_vec) {
  cobalt::love.plot(
    D1 ~ X_dml_kit,
    weights    = w_vec * (2 * D1 - 1),
    position   = "bottom",
    title      = title_str,
    thresholds = c(m = 0.1),
    var.order  = "unadjusted",
    binary     = "std",
    abs        = TRUE,
    line       = TRUE,
    colors     = viridis::viridis(2),
    shapes     = c("circle", "triangle")
  )
}

lp_h3_1 <- make_love_card_d1("ranger: Card spec\nsomecol",   w_rf_card_d1)
lp_h3_2 <- make_love_card_d1("linear+logit: Card spec\nsomecol", w_lm_card_d1)
lp_h3_3 <- make_love_kit_d1( "ranger: Kitagawa spec\nsomecol",  w_rf_kit_d1)
lp_h3_4 <- make_love_kit_d1( "linear+logit: Kitagawa spec\nsomecol", w_lm_kit_d1)

grid.arrange(lp_h3_1, lp_h3_2, lp_h3_3, lp_h3_4,
             nrow = 1,
             top = "Love plots: Card vs Kitagawa specification | DoubleML learners | somecol")


cat("\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("DoubleML EXTENDED COMPLETE.\n")
cat("Objects in memory:\n")
cat("  iivm_lm_*/iivm_rf_*/iivm_xgb_* : 12 DoubleMLIIVM fitted objects\n")
cat("  w_lm_*/w_rf_*/w_xgb_*          : 12 outcome weight vectors\n")
cat("  omega_lm_*/omega_rf_*/omega_xgb_* : raw omega objects (for further use)\n")
cat("  kw_ref_*                        : kappa weight bundles (4 cells)\n")
cat("  kappa_card_d1/d2, kappa_kit_d1/d2 : kappa estimates + SEs (dollars)\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")


```
